task: Plan the first implementation slice for this repo: Phase 0 scaffold + viewport-proof harness, based on `.scratch/photogenic-foundation/PRD.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, and ADRs 0001/0002/0004. The repo currently has docs only, no app code. Produce an ordered, verifiable implementation plan with minimal scope that creates real project scaffolding and tests at the highest seam possible. Include the likely files/modules to add, the testing approach, and the smallest meaningful deliverable that honors the PRD and ADRs without pretending the viewport problem is solved.
